The other idea I had!! I recently watched a video essay on the last of us pt 1 and the gay couple in the tv series was mentioned and I went “yes this will be done”. I’m ngl I had to wrack my brain because I didn’t want to accidentally make a character similar to iorveths’ Briggs fellows (which you should go check out btw!!)

I’m ngl I’m lowkey nervous because I feel like my worldbuilding lacks and a zombie apocalypse involves a lot of that💀. I wanted to do more world building in the personality but there were already so many tokens unfortunately :( 💔

ANYWAY I LOVE BLACK CAT CHARACTERS <33

.

Need ideas?

- You're perfectly fine, you pop out of a house having found something (a child? a dog? a reeses cup??)

- You're in the middle of fending off a horde of zombies (maybe you're protecting someone you found?)

- You got bit. Angst away

- You didn't get bit but you got hurt somehow. Maybe a beam from one of the crumbling buildings fell on you?

.

Gonna try to release that Marion opposite POV when I have the time 🙏🙏. Brickyard and I are on the same wavelength btw, two Wesleys in one day is fire 🗣️🗣️🔥.
